title: Can you move an item to the top of a board when an email is received?

posts.author: si_novum (Simon Kemp)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI.
i was wondering, is there a way to move items within a group automatically, when an email is revieced to the item?

We have a group of aprox 2500 contacts and we want to move those who reply to the top of the group.

Any help appreciated.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
You could add a date column, titled ‘last email received’, Then use an automation to set that date to the date an email is received from a column on that board. Then save your sort to have the most recent at top.

image1920×1200 181 KB

posts.author: si_novum (Simon Kemp)
posts.cookedHtml: Super. Thank you. I will give this a try and see if it’s successful!
